media_center.4: Press releases, official statements, corporate videos and downloadable media assets for Lake Group.
media_center.9: Lake Group Announces Expansion into Mozambique with New Fuel Depot and AFICD Operations
media_center.10: Lake Group has formally inaugurated its Mozambique operations, establishing Lake Oil LDA and an AFICD inland container depot to serve growing trade flows along the Beira corridor.
media_center.14: Lake Steel Reaches Cumulative 500,000 MT Production Milestone
media_center.15: Tanzania's first HS-CR rebar manufacturer, Lake Steel Ltd., has celebrated a major production milestone, 500,000 metric tonnes of high-strength corrosion-resistant rebars since commissioning.
media_center.19: Lake Group Workforce Exceeds 4,600 Employees Across 8 Countries
media_center.20: Lake Group has reported continued workforce growth, now employing over 4,600 professionals across 20+ subsidiaries in 8 countries, representing 21 nationalities.
media_center.24: For interview requests, press enquiries or media partnerships, please contact our communications team.
news.4: What's happening at announcements, expansions, product launches and community activities.
news.28: For press releases, interviews or media partnerships:
projects.4: A showcase of landmark construction, infrastructure and supply projects delivered by Lake Group across East Africa.
projects.7: From multi-million dollar construction projects to long-haul logistics contracts, Lake Group has the scale, expertise and equipment to deliver.
projects.11: GCCP supplied specialist high-performance ready-mix concrete to support civil works on Tanzania's flagship 2,115 MW Julius Nyerere Hydropower Project at Stiegler's Gorge.
projects.17: Lake Oil and Lake Trans jointly operate one of East Africa's largest petroleum supply chains, distributing fuel to 8 countries with 700+ trucks running 24/7.
projects.22: Lake Steel Rolling Mill, Tanzania First
projects.23: Tanzania's first HS-CR rebar producer. The fully computerised 25T/hr rolling mill has supplied 100,000+ MT of high-strength corrosion-resistant steel to the construction sector.
projects.29: Middle East Ready Mix LLC (MERM), Lake Group's Dubai-based premix concrete operation, is one of the largest ready-mix plants in the UAE, serving major construction projects.
projects.35: AFICD operates strategic inland container depots in Tanzania, Zambia and Mozambique, extending port capacity into the hinterland and enabling efficient cross-border trade.
projects.41: Lake Gas pioneered the introduction of composite LPG cylinders in East Africa, non-explosive, lightweight and translucent, revolutionising domestic cooking gas safety.
projects.44: Have a major project that needs energy, logistics or construction supply support?

services.4: From fuel stations to steel mills, eight sectors, one vision, across eight countries.
services.7: Lake Group operates across the full energy and industrial value chain of East and Central Africa.
services.9: Top 5 petroleum distributor in Tanzania. 85+ retail stations, bulk petroleum supply and storage.
services.12: Lake Gas LPG bottling and distribution. 6kg, 10kg, 15kg and 38kg cylinders for domestic and commercial use across 7 countries.
services.15: Lake Trans operates 700+ trucks for bulk liquid haulage and general cargo across East & Central Africa.
services.18: GCCP, Dar es Salaam's leading ready-mix concrete supplier. 30,000 m³ aggregate monthly.
services.21: Lake Lubes manufactures and distributes automotive, industrial and marine lubricants in 5 countries.
services.24: Tanzania's first HS-CR rebar producer. 100,000 MT/year rolling mill capacity.
services.27: AFICD & ACFS inland container depot and freight station services across TZ, ZM and MZ.

steel.4: Tanzania's first producer of HS-CR reinforcement steel bars. Fully computerised rolling mill with 100,000 MT annual capacity.
steel.6: First in Tanzania. Built to Last.
steel.7: Lake Steel Ltd. is the first company in Tanzania to introduce unique High Strength, Corrosion Resistant (HS-CR) reinforcement steel bars, a game-changer for the East African construction industry.
steel.9: Our state-of-the-art, fully computerised and automatic Steel Rolling Mill plant has a production capacity of up to 25 tonnes per hour, translating to an annual capacity of 100,000 metric tonnes of high-quality steel bars.
steel.12: Our HS-CR bars maintain strength at temperatures up to 600°C, compared to 350°C for ordinary rebars, providing critical fire resistance advantages for major construction projects.
steel.32: Billets tested in our lab. Only approved materials proceed.
steel.34: Billets heated to rolling temperature in our furnace.
steel.38: Quality testing to national and international standards before dispatch.
sustainability.4: Lake Group's commitment to environmental responsibility, clean energy transition and reducing our operational footprint.
sustainability.7: As a major energy and logistics company operating across 8 countries, Lake Group recognises its responsibility to operate in a manner that minimises environmental impact and contributes to sustainable development across Africa.
sustainability.8: Our sustainability strategy covers environmental stewardship, clean cooking energy access, land reclamation, waste management and progressive decarbonisation of our logistics fleet.
sustainability.9: LPG, a core business of Lake Gas, plays a critical role in East Africa's clean cooking agenda, reducing dependence on charcoal and firewood, improving indoor air quality and reducing deforestation.
sustainability.13: Lake Gas supplies LPG to 7 countries, displacing millions of charcoal cookstoves. Every cylinder sold reduces CO₂, indoor air pollution and deforestation pressure.
sustainability.15: All petroleum transport operations are governed by strict zero-tolerance spillage protocols. Our tanker fleet is regularly inspected and certified.
sustainability.17: GCCP's quarry operations at Lugoba include progressive land rehabilitation, restoring extracted areas to usable agricultural and ecological land.
sustainability.19: Ongoing investment in newer, fuel-efficient trucks, reducing per-kilometre emissions across our 700+ vehicle fleet while improving service reliability.
sustainability.22: Countries with clean LPG access via Lake Gas
sustainability.27: m³ aggregate monthly, supporting sustainable construction
